docstring:
Default table configurations for common dataset workspaces.

These functions return pre-configured ``tables`` dicts suitable for passing
to :class:`DatasetInfo`.

functions.docstring: Return default tables for an image dataset.
functions.name: default_image_tables

functions.docstring: Return default tables for a video dataset.
functions.name: default_video_tables

functions.docstring: Return default tables for a VQA dataset.
functions.name: default_vqa_tables
